director.name: 弗朗西斯·普雷南特 Françoise Prenant

this_title: I Am Too Sexy for My Body, for My Bo-ody
introduction: Forty years after the first edition of the Pan-African Festival of Algiers came the second edition in July 2009; I filmed several dance troupes rehearsing and performing; the dancers’ levitated bodies, the energy, grace and life that emanated from them. (F.P.)源自：https://www.cinemadureel.org/en/films/i-am-too-sexy-for-my-body-for-my-bo-ody-2/
chinese_title: I Am Too Sexy for My Body, for My Bo-ody
